arts.sum: Leverkusen played a phenomenal game and forced the Bavarians to suffer. In this one game, the opponent deserved it and we did it,” Kompany explained as captured by @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — February 18th: “Can Hiroki Itō establish himself at Bayern Munich?”
arts.sum: The Japanese defender had spent three years at VfB Stuttgart before making the move to Bayern, excelling in either the center-back and left-back position, but he was hardly the well known quantity that a player like João Palhinha, for example, was to fans. When Bayern Munich bought Hiroki Itō in the summer, fans had very little idea what to think.

arts.ttl: Sins of our fathers: Celtic’s Kasper Schmeichel ready for action against Bayern Munich — can he repeat his dad’s success?
arts.sum: “I think it’s probably about 19 years ago since I played against Manuel the first time, and I followed his career very, very closely. Schmeichel saw the news that Bayern Munich superstar Harry Kane missed training, but he is not going to get lulled into thinking that Kane will sit out.
